title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Apollo Pharmacy Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Apollo Pharmacy Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Apollo Pharmacy Asia Pacific Associates! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Bhubaneswar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Apollo Pharmacy Asia Pacific Associates:
Apollo Pharmacy Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Apollo Pharmacy Asia Pacific Associates!
